title: Junior Business Development Manager at Savills India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Savills India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!
